what: Add RPC transport endpoints under /project/* that validate request payloads, call corresponding application handlers, and map typed application errors into stable HTTP responses.

where.description: Mount projects router in composition root without embedding business logic.
Add route-level tests for request validation, success responses, and error mappings.

acceptance.then: Response status and body match contract and include created active project data.

acceptance.given: A request payload failing schema validation
acceptance.then: Endpoint returns deterministic validation failure response without invoking command/query handler.

patterns.name: Thin Adapter
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 4 routes contain no business logic

context: Web cannot consume project use-cases until stable transport adapters expose handlers through HTTP.
technicalNotes: Perform schema validation at boundary and delegate immediately. Merge-safe: add feature router and mount only; do not alter unrelated routes. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
